events.title: Downtown Night: A Taste of Elkhart Lake
events.description: Taste your way through signature dishes from Elkhart Lake Chamber Member restaurants, enjoy live music, and let the kids explore a variety of activities. What to Expect: Helpful Info:

events.title: Spring Vintage Weekend with SVRA
events.description: Experience the thrill of racing history at Road America’s Spring Vintage Weekend with SVRA. From classic ’50s–’70s sports cars to modern racecars, the weekend celebrates motorsport’s past and present, featuring legendary marques like Lotus, Alfa Romeo, Jaguar, Porsche, and Corvette. The action-packed schedule includes SVRA SpeedTour wheel-to-wheel racing across multiple classes—Formula 5000, Formu

events.title: Live Music in The Elk Room: Featuring Seth James
events.description: Come relax with live music by Seth James in The Elk Room at The Osthoff Resort! Kick back, enjoy a drink, and let this Seth’s captivating tunes create the perfect backdrop for a laid-back evening.

events.title: Live Music in The Elk Room: Featuring Mark Croft
events.description: Unwind with live music in The Elk Room at The Osthoff Resort, featuring Mike Crofts. Grab a drink, find a cozy spot, and enjoy Mike’s smooth sounds for a perfect, easygoing night out.

events.title: 4 Miles of Fitness
events.description: Bike, walk, or run your way around Road America’s legendary 4-mile, 14-turn road course during this fan-favorite fitness series. Set against the scenic 640-acre property, participants can explore everything from wooded cross-country trails to service roads and even the iconic racing surface itself, all in a safe, traffic-free environment. Dates & Times:Mondays & Wednesdays | May 4 – September 30,

events.title: Farmers & Artisans Market
events.description: Elkhart Lake’s Farmers & Artisans Market in the Village Square is a Saturday morning tradition. Pick up fresh seasonal vegetables, flowers, cheeses, local arts and specialty products from approximately 50 vendors. Every item sold is produced locally in the state of Wisconsin by the person right behind the stand! Grab your reusable grocery bags and head to the square every Saturday morning.

events.title: Elkhart Lake Annual Veterans Memorial Tribute
events.description: Join us in honoring our heroes on Saturday, May 23 at 11:00AM at Memorial Park (corner of Chicago Street and Hwy 67). Brat Fry & RefreshmentsCome early and stay after! Enjoy a brat fry hosted by the Elkhart Lake Lions Club from 10:00 AM to 1:30 PM. Let’s come together to remember, reflect, and give thanks.

events.title: Sunset Cruise at Road America
events.description: Sunset Cruise at Road America is a leisurely, low-speed, 3-lap experience of the iconic 4-mile track with your own vehicle. It is the perfect opportunity to experience one of the premier road courses in the country. This relaxing on-track opportunity is bucket list experience for locals and fans world-wide! Sunset Cruise runs on select dates May through September. Space is limited. Advance registr

events.title: MotoAmerica Superbikes & Vintage MotoFest
events.description: MotoAmerica Superbikes races are returning to America’s National Park of Speed on May 30-June 1, 2025. Enjoy qualifying on Friday and all-day racing on Saturday & Sunday!  Seven classes of road racing – Medallia Superbikes, Supersport, Stock 1000, Junior Cup, Mission King of the Baggers & Royal Enfield Women’s Build.Train.Race.  Meet the riders in our open race paddock!  Camping, VIP, and Fan Lap

events.title: Siebkens Live Music by Jeremiah Jams
events.description: Jam out to Jeremiah Jams on Friday night of MotoAmerica Superbike Weekend. After a day of high-speed racing, keep the energy going with live music on Siebkens’ bandstand. Jeremiah Jams Band brings a high-energy mix of psychedelic rock, funk, and soulful jam-band grooves, perfect for dancing the night away.

events.title: The Hard Left Moto Show
events.description:
The Hard Left Moto Show, presented by Hoban Brothers Motorcycle, is a summertime celebration of motorcycle culture, craftsmanship and community. Set against the backdrop of the legendary Siebkens Resort on Saturday night of the Moto America Weekend at Road America. Post Race Bike Show
6-9PM Performance Bike along with Vintage Motorcycles on display in Siebkens Resort Courtyard. Meet & Greet

events.title: Siebkens Live Music by Dave Steffen & Friends
events.description: Dave Steffen Band is live at Siebkens Resort for Saturday MotoAmerica Superbike Weekend. Blues, rock and smooth grooves, the Dave Steffen Band brings their signature sound to Siebkens Resort for an unforgettable night of music. With decades of musical talent and crowd-pleasing energy, this is a show that keeps the good times rolling long after the checkered flag drops.

events.title: Siebkens Live Music by Wire & Nail
events.description: Milwaukee’s #1 honky tonk, rock and roll band, Wire & Nail, hits the stage for IndyCar Weekend. Known for their high-energy sound, gritty vocals, and mix of classic country and rock influences, they bring a show that keeps the crowd going all night. events.title: Siebkens Live Music by Northsoul
events.description: Settle in for a summer night at Siebkens with Northsoul. Blending acoustic rock and folk-inspired pop, this Fond du Lac-based duo features Travis Worth on upright bass and vocals and Trevor Lindgren on mandolin and vocals. Their sound carries a northern soul feel, creating the perfect atmosphere for live music on the bandstand outside the Stop-Inn Tavern.

events.description: In addition to the WeatherTech International Challenge races, make time to attend the Road America Concours d’ Elegance in downtown Elkhart Lake, Wisconsin on Friday, July 17 and Saturday, July 18 from 6-8pm. events.title: Siebkens Live Music by Livin The Dream
events.description: Livin The Dream takes the stage Friday night at the Siebkens Bandstand during Vintage Weekend. As classic cars line the streets and the energy builds throughout Elkhart Lake, the band keeps the party going with a high-energy set you won’t want to miss.

events.title: Farmers & Artisans Market
events.description: Elkhart Lake’s Farmers & Artisans Market in the Village Square is a Saturday morning tradition. Pick up fresh seasonal vegetables, flowers, cheeses, local arts and specialty products from approximately 50 vendors. Every item sold is produced locally in the state of Wisconsin by the person right behind the stand! Grab your reusable grocery bags and head to the square every Saturday morning.

events.title: Throttlestop Open House
events.description: Rev up your engines for the Throttlestop Open House on Saturday, July 18th, 2026, perfectly timed to coincide with the prestigious Summer Vintage Concours d’Elegance in downtown Elkhart Lake. events.title: Elktoberfest Wine & Beer Run 5K
events.description: Join us for our 5th Annual Elktoberfest Wine & Beer Run 5K on Saturday, September 19th, 2026! This fun run/walk is a great way to kick off the Elktoberfestivities on Saturday morning, featuring great wine provided by Vintage Elkhart Wine Shop and local craft beer from 3 Sheeps Brewing. With registration options for all wine and beer lovers and runners, this race is a sure thing for a great time!

events.title: Elktoberfest
events.description: Prost! Elktoberfest returns to Elkhart Lake on Saturday, September 19, 2026!It’s one full day of Bavarian fun with stein hoists, brats, pretzels, polka, and plenty of gemütlichkeit.
